user_message: Review docs/brainstorms/v0-6-0-roadmap-plan.md as a requirements/roadmap document. Return concise findings with title, severity P0-P3, section, why it matters, autofix_class, confidence, evidence quote, suggested fix. Actively stress-test assumptions and failure modes. Focus on migration/contract breakage, hidden coupling between outcome enum and rejected-alternative schema, and claims that might fail during implementation. Document content is the v0.6.0 roadmap plan with scope: outcome enum refined/replaced, schema v14, automatic outcome recording, ranking-only accepted boost, rejected alternative quality contract with audit/normalize/manual CLI, and exclusions for extraction boost and LLM-generated historical explanations.
assistant_summary: 요청하신 조건은 “문서가 구현 시 깨질 수 있는 요구사항/로드맵 리스크가 있는지”를 확인하는 쪽으로 이해했습니다. 특히 outcome enum 변경, rejected-alternative 스키마 결합, 마이그레이션/계약 파손 가능성을 우선해서 보겠습니다.
